The '''''Kuat Explorer''''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Colony ship/Legends|colony ship]]. The ''Explorer'' was the [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] that colonized the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Alsakan/Legends|Alsakan]] in [[26,000 BBY/Legends|26,000 BBY]]. Members of the [[Hirken family]] were aboard, making them among the oldest families on Alsakan.
